query:
SELECT 
  oc.id, oc.name, oc.userId, oc.lastSyncAt, oc.dailySyncsUsed, oc.dailySyncsResetAt, oc.leadsFound, oc.isActive,
  u.plan, u.subscriptionStatus, u.trialEndsAt
FROM outreach_campaigns oc
JOIN users u ON oc.userId = u.id
WHERE oc.isActive = 1;
